text: How is PROCESS in that code language? I) In a certain code language, QUEUE is written as RVFVF. II) In a certain code language, CRWTH is written as BQVSG.

options.text: Both Statements I and II together are necessary.
Both Statements I and II together are not sufficient.

text: Is the integer number n divisible by 15? I) 9 divides n. II) 20 divides n.

options.text: Both Statements I and II together are necessary.
Both Statements I and II together are not sufficient.

text: How many pages of book X did Robert read on Sunday? I) The book has 300 pages out of which two-thirds were read by him before Sunday. II) Robert read the last 40 pages of the book on the morning of Monday.

options.text: Both Statements I and II together are necessary.
Both Statements I and II together are not sufficient.

text: How many employees of the Bank opted for VRS? I) 22% of the 950 officer cadre employees and 16% of the 1100 other cadre employees opted for VRS. II) 32% of the employees in the age-group of 53 to 59 and 19% of the employees in all other age-groups opted for VRS.

options.text: Both Statements I and II together are necessary.
Both Statements I and II together are not sufficient.

text: What is the total distance travelled by a train? I) The train travelled at an average speed of 80 km/h for 4 hours. II) The train travelled at an average speed of 100 km/h for 2 hours.

options.text: Both Statements I and II together are necessary.
Both Statements I and II together are not sufficient.

text: How many persons attended the meeting? I) Each registered person can take two persons with him/her. II) There were totally 180 registrations for the meeting.

options.text: Both Statements I and II together are necessary.
Both Statements I and II together are not sufficient.

text: In the two triangles What is the value of P+Q+R+S ? I) A + B = 90° II) P + Q = R + S

options.text: Both Statements I and II together are necessary.
Both Statements I and II together are not sufficient.

text: What is the age difference between Peter and his brother? I) Peter's age is 3 times his brother's age. II) The sum of Peter's and his brother's age is 40 years.

options.text: Both Statements I and II together are necessary.
Both Statements I and II together are not sufficient.

text: How many students scored more than the average marks of the class in a test? I) The average marks of the class was 70 II) 10 students scored above the arithmetic mean of the class

options.text: Both Statements I and II together are necessary.
Both Statements I and II together are not sufficient.

If in a certain code 'SCALE' is coded as 'ELACS', how 'CREAM' be coded?
If 'NOVEMBER' is coded as 'PQXGODGT', how would 'MARCH' be coded?
In certain code 'HILTON' is written as 'THTLNO', how is 'BILLION' written in that code?
If "ABLE" is coded as "23-24-8-1", how will you code "DARK"?
if 'ACID' = 1C3D, 'PAMPER' = P1MP2R, 'BOMBAY' = B4MB1Y then 'UNIVERSITY' =?
In certain code 'FROZEN' is written as 'OFAQTH', Then how would 'MOLTEN' be written in that code?
BGH : FKL :: DFK : ?
BEHK : 25811 :: ADGJ : ?
At what time between 4 and 5 o'clock, the hands of a clock coincide?
Six friends A, B, C, D, E and F are sitting around a round table facing the centre of the table. B is between A and C, D is between A and E and F is between C and E. Who is sitting to the right of C?
What is the angle between the hands of a clock when the time is 1:30 ?
The last day of a century CANNOT be ______ weekday?
In which of the following years was the total number of participants(athletes) is the second highest from Country C?
What was the average number of female athletes who participated from Country B over all the years together?
What was the approximate percentage decrease in the number of male athletes who participated from Country C in 2016 as compared to the previous year?
The number of female athletes who participated from Country E in the year 2018 was approximately what percentage of the total number of athletes who participated from Country B in the year 2017?
In which of the following countries is the difference between the number of male and female participants second highest in the year 2015?
Find the central angle of women employees in company B?
Total number of women employees in company 'D' is how much more than total number of women employees in company 'E'?
Find the total number of women employees in company 'A' and 'D' together?
If ratio between number of women employees and number of men employees in company 'F' is 9 : 8, then find total number of employees in company 'F'.
Total number of women employees in company 'C' is what percent less than total number of women employees in company 'A'?
Which was the day of the week on January 26, 1950?
Rita told Mani, "the girl met yesterday at the beach was the youngest daughter of the brother-in-law of my friend's mother" How is the girl related to Rita's friend?

Two trains arrived at a station at 10:45 am and 11:50 am with a late of 25 minutes and 30 minutes respectively. What is the time difference, in minutes, between their scheduled arrivals at the station?
How many Saturdays will there be in December, 2000?

There are six members in a family P, Q, R, S, T, and U. Q is the son of R, but R is not the mother of P. Q and R are a married couple. T is the brother of R. U is the brother of Q. S is the daughter of U. Who is the grandfather of S?
A bus takes 3 hours and 30 minutes to cover a distance of 280 km. To make this journey in 4 hours, by how much the speed of the bus be decreased?
What is the angle between minute hand and hour hand at 5:55 ?
Anu, Priya, Radha, Janaki, Sruti and Manju are sitting in a row. Sruti and Manju are in the centre. Anu and Priya are at the ends. Radha is sitting to the left of Anu. Who is to the right of Priya?
Five friends are sitting in a circular arrangement. In how many ways can they be seated?
